description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.41.0

Bus stop selection is now easier—you can quickly pick from recently selected stops.

• 🚏 Select boarding and alighting stops from "recently selected stops" in a history menu — both the boarding and alighting screens now let you pick frequently used stops with one tap
• Lock frequently used stops with a lock icon to keep them fixed — locked stops stay in history and don't disappear (up to 5 stops)
• Destination (direction) selection is now easier and larger — directions are now organized so you can select them directly without going through the route list, and stop names, directions, and times are displayed in larger, clearer text
